principal_diagnosis.evidence_span: Elective admission for surgical management of a malignant neoplasm of the colon

additional_diagnoses.rationale: Morphology code assigned alongside the neoplasm site code (SCS-MORPH-01).

predicted_ar_drg.description: (synthetic) MDC 06 major digestive procedure, complexity B

hard_cases_exercised: Neoplasm requires a morphology code — SCS-MORPH-01 (edits WARN if missing)
Significant OR procedure raises complexity in the grouper
Morphology code is an additional, never the principal
